NO MOON

Touch
Left thumb drag moves. Right thumb drag aims and fires.
Desktop fallback
WASD or arrows move. Mouse aims. Hold left click to fire. M toggles SFX, B toggles BGM, and number keys pick draft cards.
No mid-run menu
Clear chambers to unlock doors, find hidden reliquaries, and ride the Bellway when the descent opens.
build: loading
Choose a module
Tap a card to graft it into the hull. The room freezes while you choose; after the graft, ride the bellway when ready.
run intelligence

Field Guide

Route

Every run is ten main biome floors. Floor 5 is the Graven Warden; after it, a deliberate Starless Sky branch can replace the next two floors without skipping Moonkey-eligible indices. Floor 10 is still the Null Archon.

Relics

Reliquaries are optional trespass. Hush Compass, gravity-style grafts, and Mire’s nose make secrets easier to sniff out.

Grafts

Projectile modules stack, but the build has caps so the screen stays playable. Capped grafts stop appearing in the draft pool.

Survival

Guard layers absorb hits before integrity drops. A brief mercy window follows damage; if a hit seems ignored, your shield or i-frames probably saved you.

Desktop

WASD or arrows move. Mouse aims. Hold left click to fire. M toggles SFX, B toggles BGM, number keys pick draft cards.

Touch

Left thumb moves; right thumb aims and fires. The draft screen freezes the world so you can choose without drifting into soup.
